parameters.name: openclaw_send_message
parameters.description: Send a message to an OpenClaw autonomous AI agent and get the response. Uses the OpenAI-compatible Gateway API. Parameters: message (required, the message to send), model (agent ID, default 'openclaw:main'), system_message (optional system prompt to prepend)

value.message: ={{ $fromAI('message', 'The message to send to the OpenClaw agent', 'string') }}
value.model: ={{ $fromAI('model', 'Agent ID like openclaw:main or empty string for default', 'string') }}

schema.description: Agent ID or empty string for default
